purpose: Single-line semver file containing the current release version of ai-dev-envbuild (currently 1.3.1); read by bootstrap.sh to stamp ~/tools/env-version and by devtools doctor to detect version drift after a git pull.
invariants: Contains exactly one line: a semver string with no trailing whitespace
Must be bumped whenever a new tool is added or a group is meaningfully changed
gotchas: devtools doctor compares this file against ~/tools/env-version — a mismatch means bootstrap.sh has not been rerun after the last git pull
The version in README.md's header badge and the MCP server's package.json should be kept in sync with this file
